settings.install.iosInstructions: Tap the Share icon at the bottom, then choose 'Add to Home Screen'.
settings.install.unavailable: Your browser can't install this automatically. Use your browser's menu.
settings.credits.builtBy: Built by Mattias Geniar — open source on

handoff.reveal.subtitle: Keep your word secret from the others.
handoff.vote.subtitle: Time to vote. Don't let anyone peek.
play.instructions: Take turns saying one word related to the secret. The imposter bluffs along.
play.timeUpSubtitle: Discussion's done — head to the vote.
play.exitConfirm.title: Quit this round?
play.exitConfirm.body: The secret word and the imposter will be lost.
vote.prompt: Who do you think is the imposter?
groupVote.title: Group decision
groupVote.prompt: Discuss together — then pick the player you think is the imposter.
guess.prompt: Last chance: pick the correct secret word from the category to steal the win.
